name: ota-dashboard
description: Helix OTA 1.0.0-MVP operator dashboard — React SPA over /api/v1 (design: docs/research/main_specs/1.0.0-mvp/dashboard/dashboard_design.md)

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.vitest.json
